STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.descriptio: At the start of combat, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for every 10 cards in your deck.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.flavor: The Heartwood Ranger's staff. It was gifted to her by an ancient tree of the Silvan Woods when she swore her oath to defend the denizens of the forest.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_STAFF.title: Heartwood Staff
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.description:
On pickup, lose 10 Max HP.
Card rewards now may include [gold]Necrobinder[/gold] cards.
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.flavor: A dark deal was made with the goddess of Death and Revenge. A deal the Heartwood Ranger believes will help her save the world.
STS2_MULUNDUS-DARK_CONTRACT.title: Dark Contract
STS2_MULUNDUS-POISONOUS_FLOWER.descripti:
At the start of each combat, apply 3 [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Increase this amount by 1 in Act 2, and again in Act 3.
STS2_MULUNDUS-POISONOUS_FLOWER.flavor: A beautiful flower that The Raspberry King greatly enjoys, although he doesn't recommend anyone get close enough to smell it...
STS2_MULUNDUS-POISONOUS_FLOWER.title: Poisonous Flower
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_GOLDEN_RASPBERRY.descr: Upon pickup, add [gold]The Golden Raspberry[/gold] to your deck.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_GOLDEN_RASPBERRY.flavo: A most blessed raspberry! One of The Raspberry King's most treasured possesions. It's certain to taste delicious!
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_GOLDEN_RASPBERRY.title: The Golden Raspberry
STS2_MULUNDUS-WHIMSICAL_GIFT.description: Upon pickup, gain 5 Max HP and add an [gold]Acorn Buddy[/gold] to your deck.
STS2_MULUNDUS-WHIMSICAL_GIFT.title: Whimsical Gift
STS2_MULUNDUS-BINDOS_SPECIAL_MUSHROOM.de:
On pickup, add a [gold]Bad Mushroom Trip[/gold] to your deck.
Draw an extra card each turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-PAIR_OF_BEARS.description: On pickup, add [gold]Jake[/gold] and [gold]Aljmor[/gold] to your deck.
STS2_MULUNDUS-PAIR_OF_BEARS.title: Pair of Bears
STS2_MULUNDUS-RASPBERRY_WINE.description: At the start of your turn, randomize the cost of a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
STS2_MULUNDUS-RASPBERRY_WINE.title: Raspberry Wine
STS2_MULUNDUS-REFORGED_SOUL.description:
On pickup, lose 10 Max HP.
Add a [gold]Reforged Soul[/gold] to your deck.
STS2_MULUNDUS-REFORGED_SOUL.title: Reforged Soul
STS2_MULUNDUS-CLOAK_OF_BLOOD_WARPING.des:
On pickup, add a [gold]Blood Warp[/gold] into your [gold]Deck[/gold].
Start each combat with 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
